description.value: Dress Circle is a premier home goods store in Ahmedabad, offering a curated selection of stylish and functional items to enhance every living space. They provide high-quality products, from elegant decor to essential furnishings, designed to transform houses into beautiful homes.

address.value: G2, shapath 4, opposite karnavati club, SG Highway

bio.value: Dress circle is a brand that caters as a one-stop solution for a range of interior and architectural

catalog_items.description: Sand Dollar by Dress Circle is a durable laminate designed to stay beautiful through everyday life. It is crafted to handle moisture, heat, touch, time, and the quiet chaos of daily living with ease, making it suitable for warm kitchens and lived-in spaces.

social_source.caption:
Some materials look good.
Some materials earn trust over time.

Introducing Sand Dollar by Dress Circle.
A laminate designed to stay beautiful through everyday life.

From warm kitchens to lived-in spaces, it is crafted to handle moisture, heat, touch, time and the quiet chaos of daily living with ease.

Because true luxury is not delicate.
It lasts.

#DressCircle #DecorSurfaces #LaminateDesign #InteriorDesignIndia #ModernInteriors

catalog_items.description: These Thermo Extruded Polymer Sheets offer a natural aesthetic combined with engineered strength and resilience. They provide a clean, modern, and lasting finish suitable for various spaces, including kitchens and high-usage areas, without compromising on design.

social_source.caption:
Natural feel. Engineered strength.

Our Thermo Extruded Polymer Sheets bring together the warmth of natural aesthetics with the resilience of advanced materials.

From kitchens to high-usage spaces, they deliver a clean, modern finish that lasts - without compromising on design.

✔ Durable core
✔ Moisture resistant
✔ Low maintenance
✔ Seamless modern finish

Inspired by nature. Built for real life.

Dress Circle. @insidedresscircle

catalog_items.description: A Dress Circle laminate featuring a light-colored, striped wood-grain texture, designed for both aesthetics and performance in modern interiors. It boasts clean textures, seamless application, and effortless impact, built to be durable and impressive.

specifications.Durability: Scratch resistant, Waterproof, Termite proof, Built to last

social_source.caption:

And the right laminate brings every detail to life.

Dress Circle laminates are crafted for spaces that demand both aesthetics and performance.
Clean textures. Seamless application. Effortless impact.

Scratch resistant. Waterproof. Bendable. Termite proof. Direct to wall.
Built to last. Designed to impress.

Because great design is not loud. It is precise.

catalog_items.description: Versatile Fervor is a textured laminate designed for modern interiors, offering refined texture and long-lasting strength. It features large-format application and a seamless finish to create cohesive and calm spaces.

social_source.caption:
More than just a surface.

Versatile Fervor is where tactile design meets intelligent performance.
Built to adapt across spaces, it introduces refined texture while ensuring long-lasting strength.

With large-format application and seamless finish, it creates spaces that feel cohesive, calm, and complete.

✔ Size: 3000mm x 2060mm
✔ Thickness: 1.25mm – 1.5mm

Designed for modern interiors that demand both beauty and reliability.

catalog_items.description: Monoso Tessuto is a textured laminate designed to look handcrafted and feel hand-knitted, offering soft aesthetics with strong performance. It is durable, low maintenance, and ideal for creating statement spaces on walls.

social_source.caption:
This isn’t fabric… but it feels like it. 🤯

Meet Monoso Tessuto —
a textured laminate that looks handcrafted and feels hand-knitted.

Soft aesthetics. Strong performance.

✔ 8x4 ft format
✔ 1.25–1.5 mm thickness
✔ Durable, low maintenance
✔ Designed for statement spaces

Because your walls deserve more than just flat finishes.

catalog_items.raw_name: Dresscircle Wood Finish Laminates & Panels Collection
catalog_items.clean_name: Dresscircle Wood Finish Laminates & Panels Collection
catalog_items.description: Dresscircle's collection of wood finish laminates and panels offers the aesthetic richness of real wood with superior performance. These hybrid veneers and textured panels are designed for modern spaces, providing zero maintenance, enhanced durability, and resistance to warping and termites.
catalog_items.seo_title: Dresscircle Wood Finish Laminates & Panels Collection
catalog_items.alt_text: Dresscircle Wood Finish Laminates & Panels Collection

specifications.Product Type: Hybrid veneer, Wood finish laminate, Wood texture panels, Decorative laminates
specifications.Finishes Available: Scandinavian Oak, Smoked Chestnut, Grey Poplar
specifications.Key Benefits: Zero maintenance, High durability, No warping, No termites, Pure aesthetic + performance

social_source.caption:
Looks like wood. Outperforms it. 🔥

Why settle for real wood…
when you can get the same richness, zero maintenance, and way more durability?

From Scandinavian Oak → Smoked Chestnut → Grey Poplar,
this is nature reimagined for modern spaces.

✔ No warping
✔ No termites
✔ No compromises

Just pure aesthetic + performance.

Welcome to the future of wood finishes.

#HybridVeneer #InteriorDesignIndia #LuxuryInteriors #ModernSpaces #DecorSurfaces

catalog_items.description: These Thermoformed Extruded Polymer Sheets are engineered for design freedom, offering high flexibility and formability for curves, contours, and seamless finishes. They are lightweight, durable, and resistant to moisture and impact, making them ideal for modern design applications like curved furniture, panels, and custom installations.

social_source.caption:
SHAPE IT. BEND IT. BUILD BEYOND LIMITS.

Thermoformed Extruded Polymer Sheets are engineered for design freedom — where surfaces don’t just sit, they adapt.

Curves, contours, seamless finishes — all made effortless.

▫️ High flexibility & formability
▫️ Smooth, uniform surface finish
▫️ Lightweight yet durable
▫️ Moisture & impact resistant
▫️ Ideal for curved furniture, panels & custom installations

Because modern design isn’t flat — it flows.

Dress Circle Decor Surfaces

catalog_items.description: Niche Decors are decorative laminates from Dress Circle, designed to add depth, rhythm, and quiet sophistication to modern spaces. They feature rich textured surface finishes and are built to be scratch resistant, waterproof, flexible, and termite-proof.

social_source.caption:
Crafted in every texture. Defined by detail.

Niche Decors is where subtle textures meet statement design — adding depth, rhythm, and quiet sophistication to modern spaces.
Because luxury isn’t loud. It’s layered.

▫️ Rich textured surface finish
▫️ Large format sheets (3000 × 2060 mm)
▫️ Precision thickness (1.25–1.5 mm)
▫️ Scratch resistant & waterproof
▫️ Flexible, termite-proof & easy to install

Designed to be seen. Built to be felt.

catalog_items.description: Bohemian Class decor surfaces are elegant textured laminates designed to bring warmth, depth, and a subtle artistic edge to modern interiors. They offer a unique feeling where minimal design meets rich surface detail, providing a durable and aesthetically pleasing finish.

social_source.caption:
Crafted in every texture. Designed for every mood.

Bohemian Class brings warmth, depth, and a subtle artistic edge to modern interiors — where minimal design meets rich surface detail.
It’s not just a finish. It’s a feeling.

▫️ Elegant textured laminates
▫️ Large format sheets (3000 × 2060 mm)
▫️ Precision thickness (1.25–1.5 mm)
▫️ Scratch resistant & waterproof
▫️ Flexible, termite-proof & easy to install

Because great spaces are built layer by layer — starting with the surface.

catalog_items.clean_name: Era of Rock Stone (The Rock Series)
catalog_items.description: The Rock Series captures the true essence of natural stone, delivering powerful textures that transform walls into architectural statements. These panels are built for impact and designed for longevity, offering a raw, bold, and timeless aesthetic for spaces that demand presence.

catalog_items.alt_text: Era of Rock Stone (The Rock Series)

social_source.caption:
This wall speaks before you do.

Raw. Bold. Timeless.

The Rock Series captures the true essence of natural stone — delivering powerful textures that transform walls into architectural statements.

Built for impact. Designed for longevity.

▫️ Natural rock texture finish
▫️ 8×4 ft large format panels

For spaces that demand presence.

reviews.author: Amit Dave
reviews.text: Nice staff. Good varieties of laminates

reviews.author: Dipen Vyas
reviews.text: Best place for Laminates, High Gloss Acrylic, and many more wood related products. Vast varieties. Nice sales staff.
reviews.owner_response: Thanks a lot Mr. Vyas for such a great appreciation. Our company is constantly working towards upgrading our product range and providing our customers with good products and service. Thanks again

reviews.author: Parekh Kunal201
reviews.text: Nice place for furniture and laminate

reviews.author: rutvija dani
reviews.text: Worst experience! The attitude and way of communication is very arrogant. Though I purchased the material from the place, the way of addressing my query from the owner is very rude. Kindly work more on ur skills and be customer oriented!

reviews.author: Smit Sanghvi
reviews.text:
The collections and various designs here are fabulously amazing.
A one stop interior decor for your home solutions.

reviews.author: Jaydev Dua
reviews.text: Beautiful display of amazing interior products. Must visit if you are renovating or decorating your property.

reviews.author: Vinay Nair
reviews.text: The best place in the city with the widest variety to choose from to design ur dream home!!!

reviews.author: Shashin Shah
reviews.text: Good very good place with lots of options for surfaces and very co operative people

plan_execution.reasoning: The seller has a company website and a good company profile. There are no raw products, so the product agent will need to generate products from the website. No reviews API, so skipping reviews agent. Will ensure Sign3 validation.
